name: Layered Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the sauce, blend the tomatoes and their juice with the onion and garlic in a blender or food processor.
2. Pour the mixture into a medium-sized saucepan.
3. Add the ground red pepper, salt, and tomato paste to the saucepan.
4. Heat the sauce until it comes to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5-10 minutes.
5. Place three tortillas at the bottom of the crockpot.
6. Layer one-third of the ground beef, one-third of the tomato sauce, and one-third of the shredded cheddar cheese on top of the tortillas.
7. Repeat steps 5 and 6 two more times.
8. Cover the casserole with foil or a lid and cook on low for 6-8 hours.
